FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does a typical project take?

Project timelines vary by scope. A landing site typically takes 2–4 weeks. A full web application is 3–6 months. We'll provide a detailed timeline after your discovery call.

Do you work with startups or only enterprises?

Both. We've worked with pre-seed startups building MVPs and Fortune 500 companies rebuilding legacy systems.

What's included in your support plans?

All projects include 30 days of post-launch support. Extended plans cover 24/7 monitoring, SLA-backed response times, and monthly performance reports.

Can we own the source code?

Yes. Full IP and source code ownership transfers to you upon project completion and final payment. No lock-in, no strings attached.
